total_opportunity: The system scores all consumer cards and prioritizes hidden SME-like customers for review.
why_high_priority: High-priority cards usually show high online spending, recurring payments, focused MCC spending, or high spending intensity.
recommended_next_step: Start with top 1% and top 5% candidates, review explanations, select recommended product, and save feedback after contact.
model_limitation: The score is not proof of commercial activity. It is a prioritization signal for business review.
